items.title: Weekend predictions: Will Rosenior exit stop Chelsea slide? Arsenal's collapse to continue?
items.summary: Chelsea play their first match post-Rosenior, while Arsenal try to rebound from a crushing loss in the Premier League title race. Julien Laurens makes his predictions.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Bates to retire from international cricket after T20 World Cup
items.summary: "I have one final mission: to head to the UK and win another World Cup," she says
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: USA Manager Mauricio Pochettino Admits Tottenham 'Feels Like Home'
items.summary: Mauricio Pochettino has admitted that he would like to return to Tottenham in the future.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
